nasb.text: You have spurned the covenant of Your servant; You have profaned his crown in the dust.

esv.text: You have renounced the covenant with your servant; you have defiled his crown in the dust.

cnv.text: 你捨棄了和你僕人所立的約， 把他的冠冕玷污在地。

ccb.text: 你废弃与他所立的约， 把他的冠冕扔在尘土中。

csbs.text: 你废弃了与你仆人所立的约， 把他的冠冕践踏在地。
